scene: A cartoon person chatting with a speech bubble, while their smartphone on the table leans in with a big suspicious eyeball on its screen, as if eavesdropping. Flat warm yellow background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A smartphone character holding up a thick file folder stuffed with little icons of a map pin, a magnifying glass, two people, and a shopping bag, like a detective dossier about its owner. Flat teal background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A smartphone with a crystal ball floating above it, showing a product the user is about to want, while the surprised cartoon owner has not even spoken yet. Flat deep purple background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A smartphone character shrugging with a sly grin, surrounded by floating little prediction graphs and target symbols, the owner looking unsettled. Flat coral pink background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
